chunks.memory_unit_text: In the starship/starship release v1.12.0, many features are added: Haxe support, an operating system module, an AWS expiration fallback, Azure username config, a bug-report confirmation prompt, a before_repo_root_style for directories, lightweight tag support in git_commit, a guix_shell module, which-rs for init path resolution, reserved remote address for localip, right prompt for nu, an Open Policy Agent module, gradle version from gradle.properties, No Empty Icons and no-nerd-font presets, and chocolatey publishing. chunks.memory_unit_text: In the starship/starship release v1.13.0, new modules are introduced: pijul_channel, fennel, fossil_branch, gradle, and improved hg_branch with mercurial topics. Other features include --profile support for custom config profiles, env_var.VAR in format strings, .sdkmanrc for Java, log cleanup, and nix shell command support. Bug fixes cover container confusion reduction, fish vi mode transient prompt, git_commit test stability, gradle version regex improvements, nushell let-env warning, nodejs style application, and removal of vulnerabilities.
